ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "level_1" TEXT /* Level 1 categorization of the study */,
  "level_2" INTEGER /* Level 2 categorization of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the study began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the study ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the study is conducted */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_level_1 FOREIGN KEY ("level_1") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the outcome belongs to */,
  "ps_est" REAL /* Estimated outcome (ps_est) for the study */,
  "rct_est" REAL /* Randomized controlled trial estimate (rct_est) for the study */,
  "ps_after" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the outcome is after a certain event or intervention */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome */,
  "outcome_measure" TEXT /* Specific measure used for the outcome */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the estimated outcome */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the statistical significance of the outcome */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_outcomes_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level (e.g., Medicine, Psychology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "parent_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent level (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention */,
  "intervention_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the intervention */,
  "intervention_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_interventions" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "intervention_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention started */,
  "intervention_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention ended */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dose of the intervention (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the study was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_access_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version detail */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the detail belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version detail is approved (0 or 1) */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the version detail was not approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_details_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES study_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reviewing the study */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_reviews_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
